monday.description: Pan-seared anchovies are combined with roasted eggplant and served over gluten-free rice vermicelli, finished with a drizzle of toasted sesame oil.

tuesday.description: Slow-cooked squab is served with sautéed kale and long-grain rice, finished with a pat of organic salted butter.

wednesday.description: Ground turkey is pan-seared and served with steamed bamboo shoots and gluten-free whole wheat sandwich bread, finished with a drizzle of reduced-sodium XO sauce.

thursday.description: Grilled beef ribeye is wrapped in gluten-free aloo paratha with sautéed beech mushrooms and a sprinkle of kasoori methi.

friday.description: Poached crayfish is served on toasted gluten-free bagels with roasted radicchio and a drizzle of ghost pepper sauce.

monday.description: Grated cabrales is baked with gluten-free pastina, roasted artichokes, and a sprinkle of ground sansho pepper.

tuesday.description: Smoked tofu is pan-seared and served on banh mi rolls with pickled yu choy and a dollop of tartar sauce.

wednesday.description: Roasted almond butter is spread on chapati and served with steamed okra and a side of full-fat strawberry yogurt.

thursday.description: Camembert is melted over couscous with sautéed dried bunashimeji mushrooms and a sprinkle of dried chervil.

friday.description: Beaufort is melted over bucatini with roasted poblano peppers and a drizzle of rapeseed oil.
